# Pagination

Marker- and offset-paginated list operations return an
`iter.Seq2[*T, error]` — the list method *is* the paginator. Range over it
to walk every page transparently:

```go
for item, err := range client.Folders.ListItems(ctx, folderID, nil) {
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	// use item
}
```

The iterator threads the cursor for you and stops when the last page is
reached. It copies the options you pass, so your struct is never
mutated.
